channel.title: Continuum Archive Index — npub1ldcqc6uhys0tqam22nr5uyavu5qr5jjkrxup6lhkcn60eq8xyhmq88042a (Articles)
channel.description: Index for npub1ldcqc6uhys0tqam22nr5uyavu5qr5jjkrxup6lhkcn60eq8xyhmq88042a filtered to articles (kind:30023), newest 500.

item.title: The Sovereign Archive: The Canonical Bitcoin Chronicles Index
item.description: This index presents the canonical, chronologically ordered, arc-based structure of the Bitcoin Chronicles Universe — a continuity map spanning early Earthbound origins, interplanetary expansion, philosophical eras, sovereign colonies, far-future civilizations, and the later return to practical sovereignty. As the universe grows, this index will remain the authoritative guide for narrative placement across arcs, eras, and worlds.

item.title: Continuum Magazine Premium Index
item.description: Premium Index for paid articles updated weekly.

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #13 (Nov.24-30, 2025)
item.description: # 13. This issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Nov.24-Nov.30, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction.

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #14 (Dec. 1-7, 2025)
item.description: # 14. This issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Dec.1-7, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction.

item.description: # 11. This issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Nov.10-Nov.16, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction.

item.description: # 9. This issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Oct.27-Nov.2, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction.

item.description: # 8. This issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Oct.20-26, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction.

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #7 (Oct.13-19, 2025)
item.description: # 7. This issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Oct.13-19, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction.

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #6 (Oct.6-12, 2025)
item.description: # 6. This issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Oct.6-12, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction. Reflections on mortality, reflecting on the week before my father's passing (on Sept. 29, 2025)

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #5 (Sept. 29-Oct. 5, 2025)
item.description: # 5. This issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Sept. 29-Oct. 5, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction. Reflections on mortality, reflecting on the week before my father's passing (on Sept. 29, 2025)

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #4 (Sept. 22-28, 2025)
item.description: The fourth issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Sept 22–28 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction. Reflections on mortality, reflecting on the week before my father's passing (on Sept. 29, 2025)

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #3 (Sept. 15-21, 2025)
item.description: The third issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Sept 15–21 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction.

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #2 (Sept. 8-14, 2025)
item.description: The second issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Sept 8–14, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each weekday, with the weekends having 3 articles, all anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction. This week we noted the tragic assasination of Charlie Kirk and the observance of Sept. 11. But, we also launched Continuum Magazine (first issue was published this week)

item.title: Continuum Magazine - Issue #1 (Sept 1-7, 2025)
item.description: The first issue of Continuum Magazine brings together the Sept 1–7, 2025 writings: one paid article and two free reflections each day. Anchored in themes of sovereignty, faith, and conviction, this issue opens with a heavy remembrance of Sept 11 and the loss of Charlie Kirk, and moves through questions of labor, covenant, community, and renewal.

item.title: Continuum Magazine — Index
item.description: Index of all Continuum Magazine Issues

item.title: Introducing Continuum Pro: A Sovereign Archive for Nostr’s Builders
item.description: This editorial introduces Continuum Pro as a sovereign archive layer for Nostr’s builders and writers. It explains why relays and clients are not true memory, and how Continuum Pro preserves long-form work in open, portable structures with a public viewer, per-npub library pages, and long-term stewardship for creators who want their work to outlive feeds and client churn.
